compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: Blue triangle labeled 'ADF' in the NEURONS compartment of Panel E; gene tph-1 is shown above it.

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: Green triangle labeled 'AWB' in the NEURONS compartment of Panel E; gene ser-6 is shown to its left.

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: Yellow hexagon labeled 'URX' in the NEURONS compartment of Panel E; gene mod-1 is shown above it. Also labeled as arrowhead in Panel C micrographs.

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: Red pentagon labeled 'RIC' in the NEURONS compartment of Panel E; gene tbh-1 is shown above it.

compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Gray oval/shaded region in Panel E labeled 'NEURONS', containing ADF, AWB, URX, and RIC cell types.

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Green rounded box labeled 'INTESTINE' on the right side of Panel E; contains nhr-76, ATGL, and β-oxidation/Fat loss nodes.

genes.snippet: Labeled above the ADF triangle in Panel E; also used as mutant genotype in Panels A and B.
Labeled to the left of the AWB triangle in Panel E.
Labeled above the URX hexagon in Panel E; also referenced in transgene Pflp-8::mod-1SAS in Panels C and D.
Labeled above the RIC shape in Panel E.
Node in the INTESTINE compartment of Panel E; receives endocrine signal from URX/NEURONS.
Node in the INTESTINE compartment of Panel E, downstream of nhr-76; linked to β-oxidation/Fat loss.

tentative_edges.snippet: Solid pointed arrow from ADF (tph-1) to URX (mod-1) labeled '5-HT' in Panel E, indicating serotonin-mediated signaling.
Solid pointed arrow from AWB (ser-6) toward ADF (tph-1) in Panel E. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Solid pointed arrow from RIC (tbh-1) to AWB (ser-6) labeled 'Oct' (octopamine) in Panel E.
Dashed arrow from URX to RIC in Panel E; directionality and exact relation are inferred from dashed style, suggesting indirect/modulatory regulation. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Dashed pointed arrow crossing from URX/NEURONS to INTESTINE in Panel E, explicitly labeled 'endocrine signal'.
Solid pointed arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL within the INTESTINE compartment in Panel E.

Solid pointed arrow from ATGL to 'β-oxidation Fat loss' node within the INTESTINE compartment in Panel E, indicating ATGL promotes fatty acid β-oxidation and fat loss. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
